prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-EMERGENCY-CITY-50PC-SET Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Deluxe 50pc Construction Micro Wheels Kids Complete Toy Car Play Set Description: The 50pc Die Cast Emergency Vehicle Play Set is a great addition to any kids toy car collection. This set comes with all the things a kid needs to roam around a pretend city: police cars, ambulance trucks, firefighter trucks, helicopters etc.

Each set also comes with a 21 x 26 inch city map, so kids can place the vehicles around town. Featured on the map are buildings including a school, police station, fire station, bus station, shop and hospital.

This is a great gift idea for young kids and toy vehicle collectors alike. Search Terms: kids toys boys cars race Features: - Fun Emergency Themed Toy Cars & Traffic Equipment - Die Cast Metal & Durable Plastic - Trucks, Cars, Traffic Signs, Helicopter & More - Great Gift Idea for Kids - Ideal holiday stiocking stuffers and gifts for boys === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products 50-pc Emergency Vehicle Toy Car Play Set

tokens.name: Emergency Vehicle Toy Car Play Set

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products 50-pc Emergency Vehicle Play Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Die Cast Metal Vehicles, Included City Map, Police Cars, Ambulances, Fire Trucks, Helicopters, Traffic Signs

openai.title_differentiation: Die Cast Metal And Durable Plastic, Police Cars, Ambulance, Fire Truck, Helicopter, City Map, Traffic Signs
